paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently at 5.93, with a change of -5.12% compared to the prior close and -31.52% over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of the date 2026-07-16.

There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours, with headlines discussing the company's recent convertible notes deal and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns. The news articles are from sources such as simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance, and were published on dates including 2026-07-17 and 2026-07-16.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings, and 2 new social posts in the last 24 hours, with users discussing the stock price and adding to their positions.
